title: PAIK Environment
description: One running instance of the system. See SPEC.md section 8.

purpose.description: e.g. "developer integration testing", "customer-facing production, EU region"

host_ref.description: Free-text pointer to where connection details live (a Vault path, an env var name) - never a credential

component.description: Optional: id of the component this database belongs to, when the environment is shared across multiple components

access.description: Who can reach this environment and how, e.g. "VPN + SSO required"
